title: Control Mapping Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Control Mapping skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

documented_risk_universe.description: Documented risk universe or risk register covering the scope of the assessment

inventory_existing_controls.description: Inventory of existing controls, including control descriptions, control type (preventive, detective, corrective), and control owner

process_documentation_system.description: Process documentation and system descriptions for the in-scope operational areas

relevant_regulatory_legal.description: Relevant regulatory, legal, and internal policy requirements that controls must satisfy

prior_internal_audit.description: Prior internal audit findings or external audit management letters identifying known control weaknesses

industry_control_frameworks.description: Industry control frameworks (COSO, COBIT, NIST) to use as a reference overlay for gap identification
